promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this selection audit as active A2 control memory, as proof of global intake completion, or as authority to promote any nominated parent without a separate bounded child reduction.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the stale queued next step pointed at archive-root closure work that already exists in repo state, so the real bounded job was a live-ledger residual audit and next-target nomination.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The completed archive batch01, batch02, and batch03 children prove the archive-root packaged family is now direct-child closed enough that the next high-yield move must leave that lane and re-rank still-unchilded source-bearing parents.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The four early a2feed big-doc source maps were compared as the remaining strongest unchilded source-bearing parents, while the branchthread, apple-axis, and Thread-A outer-interface reductions were used to test how bounded the GPT trigram file now is relative to nearby already-reduced seams.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it is inventory-first composite transcript lineage with strong reuse value but weaker bounded next-step compression value than the GPT trigram workshop.
Deferred because it remains a broad integrated-model and repair surface whose narrower re-entry seams are still less cleanly bounded than the GPT trigram file's named sub-pass structure.
Deferred because it is more replay-heavy and duplication-dense, with correction-manifesto value that remains real but less bounded for the immediate next pass than the GPT trigram file.
Deferred because purgeable cache inventory and export-family revisit value remains below source-bearing early a2feed re-entry now.
Deferred because deep-archive root topology and milestone inventory remain lower-yield than a strong source-bearing unchilded big-doc parent.

raw_source_reread_reason: This batch is a routing audit, not a child reduction. The live ledger plus the existing source-map parents and sibling A2-mid reductions were sufficient to nominate the next bounded target without reopening raw corpus lines.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVE_ROOT_PACKAGED_BATCH01_TO_BATCH10_IS_NOW_DIRECT_CHILD_CLOSED_ENOUGH_TO_EXIT_AS_PRIMARY_REENTRY_LANE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the routing fact that the archive-root packaged family now has enough direct-child coverage that it is no longer the strongest immediate re-entry lane.

candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the narrowed live unresolved pool after archive-lane closure: the remaining strongest source-bearing unchilded parents are the early a2feed big-doc source maps rather than archive packages.

candidate_items.name: A0_THREADSAVE_REMAINS_REAL_BUT_INVENTORY_FIRST_AND_LOWER_YIELD_THAN_BIGDOC_REENTRY

quarantined_items.name: SELECTION_AUDIT_AS_ACTIVE_A2_CONTROL_UPDATE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: This batch is only a bounded routing packet under A2-mid and must not be promoted directly into active control memory.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the live routing facts that matter now: the archive-root package lane is no longer the strongest immediate gap, the early a2feed big-doc set is the real source-bearing unresolved pool, and the GPT trigram file is the cleanest next bounded target inside that pool.
They remain selection-only, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active A2 authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain stale-lane reopening, global-completion overread, inventory-first or package-first priority drift, or active-control promotion rather than clean A2-mid routing packets.
The audit is useful for target selection, but not promotable as active law.
